title: Message Service Configuration Schema
description: Internal schema for validating message service configurations in ExternalDataSource. Supports Slack, Teams, and Email message services for notifications.

metadata.name: Message Service Configuration Schema
metadata.description: JSON schema for validating message service configurations
metadata.author: AI Fabrix Team

changes: Initial schema for message service validation
Support for Slack, Teams, and Email message services
CIP-based configuration for Slack and Teams
Provider-based configuration for Email (SendGrid, SES, SMTP)

messageServiceType.description: Type of message service: 'slack' for Slack notifications, 'teams' for Microsoft Teams notifications, 'email' for email notifications

datasourceKey.description: ExternalDataSource key for CIP-based services (Slack, Teams). Required when messageServiceType is 'slack' or 'teams'.

email.description: Email service configuration (required when messageServiceType is 'email')

provider.description: Email provider: 'sendgrid' for SendGrid API, 'ses' for AWS SES, 'smtp' for SMTP server

apiKey.description: API key for SendGrid (required when provider is 'sendgrid')

accessKey.description: AWS access key for SES (required when provider is 'ses')

secretKey.description: AWS secret key for SES (required when provider is 'ses')

region.description: AWS region for SES (required when provider is 'ses')

host.description: SMTP server host (required when provider is 'smtp')

port.description: SMTP server port (required when provider is 'smtp')

useTls.description: Use TLS for SMTP (when provider is 'smtp')

fromEmail.description: From email address (required when messageServiceType is 'email')
